violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the prep area of the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025

Ambient temperature of 2-door lowboy #2 was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods in this unit observed with temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods were moved to a properly functioning unit. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The doors to the outside, located on either side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

Some of the individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025

Hand-washing sinks in the kitchen were observed blocked by buckets of sanitizer in the basins and trash cans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The can opener was sent through the dishwasher at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. A call to service to made to resolve issue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the playground side of cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The individual cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Ambient temperature of 2-door lowboy unit #2 observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter observed with a temperature of 42 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed during inspection. No TCS foods to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The doors to the outside, located in near the gym and at the entrance to the athletic and community center, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
